allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const files=fs.readdirSync\('.'\).filter\(f=>f.endsWith\('.json'\)\); let ok=0,fail=0; files.forEach\(f=>{try{JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(f,'utf8'\)\);ok++;console.log\('OK:',f\)}catch\(e\){fail++;console.log\('FAIL:',f,e.message\)}}\); console.log\(ok+' OK,',fail+' FAIL'\)")
